data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Auto-credit or coupon issuance rules' but failed to provide any concrete evidence or endpoints that demonstrate how these rules are implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for such rules but does not include any specific details or evidence of their existence, leading to a clear gap in the requirement. The absence of any related evidence or endpoints means that the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of auto-credit or coupon issuance rules provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define auto-credit issuance rules
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify the existence and functionality of auto-credit or coupon issuance rules.
